name: Baked Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to an even thickness.
2. Mix together flour, onion, garlic, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish.
3. Melt butter in a baking pan until it begins to foam slightly.
4. Coat each chicken breast on all sides with the seasoned flour mixture, pressing to ensure good coverage. Turn skin side up if applicable.
5. Place chicken in the prepared pan and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30 minutes.
6. During the last part of cooking, prepare a lemon basting sauce by mixing together lemon juice, remaining onion, garlic, salt, and pepper.
7. Brush the chicken with half of the basting sauce, then return it to the oven.
8. Finish baking for an additional 30 minutes or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
9. Serve hot with rice and a vegetable side dish.
